args.message: This 2016 Tahoe LT is a popular model, and this particular one is well-equipped. The LT trim offers a great balance of features and comfort. While the mileage is 142,000, the vehicle has been kept in good running condition, and comparable models in this condition and trim level are consistently valued in the mid-$20,000s. We also have a motivated seller who is looking to make a fair deal.
